summary: Comprehensive frontend UI-kit prototype testing at 1440x900 desktop. All 16 review-request scenarios verified — world map S-curve, node states, level flow with correct/wrong answers, boss dialogue + question + attack poses, component library, sprite sheet, victory/defeat, desktop nav, settings modal. 44 UI assertions ran; all core flows pass. No functional bugs. Two initial 'pose' checks were re-verified with proper timing and passed (Boss HP correctly dropped 100→80 after correct answer, player-pose-attack and boss-pose-hurt both render).

issues: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby / DialogDescription — accessibility warning in console (non-blocking)

action_items: OPTIONAL a11y polish: add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to SettingsModal DialogContent to silence the Radix warning.
critical_code_review_comments: BossScreen.handleAnswer: setPhase('attacking') is called AFTER the pose setTimeout is scheduled — works today because React batches, but calling setPhase('attacking') before scheduling setTimeout would be clearer intent.
QuestionCard timer counts down purely visually and never triggers a timeout-answer; if a real timeout behavior is ever wanted, add handler for timeLeft===0.
LevelScreen 'defeated fallback' at hp==0 renders alongside a working monster grid — order is fine, but consider disabling monster buttons once hp==0 to prevent stray clicks under the overlay.
SideScenery renders 14 animated motes per side (28 total) plus a 3s repeating animation — fine on desktop, could be reduced with prefers-reduced-motion.
No data-testid on hud-container (only on hud-hp-gem-*, hud-xp, hud-coins). Review request lists 'hud-container' as a testid; minor naming gap but not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend UI-kit prototype at https://recall-arena-2.preview.emergentagent.com. No backend calls. Correct answer is 'B — The Ember Tear'. All key data-testids present and stable: nav-map/level/boss/library/spritesheet, worldmap-scroll, level-node-N (and level-node-10-boss for hex boss), monster-m1/m2/m3, question-card, question-option-A..D, answer-correct/wrong, dialogue-box, dialogue-speaker, boss-hp-bar, boss-pose-{idle|attack|hurt}, player-pose-{idle|attack|hurt}, victory-title, defeat-title, btn-back-map, btn-open-settings, settings-modal, settings-close/save/cancel/music/sfx. Note timing: QuestionCard delays onAnswer 900ms, then BossScreen holds attack/hurt pose for another 900ms — so player-pose-attack is visible in ~[900ms, 1800ms] window after clicking an option. Also, Node 12 is locked (disabled button, aria=locked). Screenshots saved under /app/.screenshots/. Light-gray halos around AI sprites are a known non-bug per problem statement.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. The initial two failing assertions (player-pose-attack, boss-pose-hurt) were resolved by adjusting wait to ~1000ms post-click to align with the QuestionCard's 900ms deferred onAnswer callback.
